diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,177 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Hono (../../hono), HonoOptions (/hono-base), Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler (/types)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createHandlers with variable-length arguments (x1-x10 handlers) to combine handlers and middleware, plus createFactory function with initApp and defaultOptions.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context (/context), GET_MATCH_RESULT (/request/constants), RouterRoute (/types), getPattern, splitRoutingPath (/utils/url)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper for inspecting registered routes, includes functions to get matched routes and path info from context with optional index parameter for navigation.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, SendOptions, defineWebSocketHelper, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent
+- Reads as: Context (/context), MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse (/types), StatusCode (/utils/http-status)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for Hono including upgrade handler, context class for send/close operations, WSEvents interface, and defineWebSocketHelper factory function.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Context (/context), parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned (/utils/cookie)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading and writing cookies, includes signed cookie functions with server-side secrets, supports Secure and Host prefixes.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc (/client), Client, ClientRequestOptions (/client/types), Context (/context), Hono (/hono), Schema (/types), UnionToIntersection (/utils/types)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper that creates test clients by wrapping the app with a custom fetch implementation using hc, binds app environment and execution context.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime type
+- Reads as: Context (/context)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light, other) via user agent or global properties, provides env accessor with runtime context.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: raw (/helper/html), DOM_RENDERER (/jsx/constants), createCssJsxDomObjects (/jsx/dom/css)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Reads from neighbors: CLASS_NAME, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, SELECTOR, SELECTORS, STYLE_STRING, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon (/css/common)
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for reactive styles with class name hashing, provides css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition/Style exports, includes createCssContext factory for custom configuration.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, defaultExtensionMap
+- Reads as: none
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Writes to neighbors: (see above)
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities including minification and building style strings from template literals, generates hashed class names, provides view transition support.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN
+- Reads as: HTTPException (/http-exception), RequestHeader (/utils/headers)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch implementation with RFC 9110 compliance, strips hop-by-hop headers, validates Connection header, returns proxied responses with modified headers.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono (/hono), Env, RouterRoute (/types), getColorEnabled (/utils/color), findTargetHandler, isMiddleware (/utils/handler)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for displaying and inspecting route definitions with support for colorized output, optionally shows middleware with verbose flag, extracts router name.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString (/utils/html)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Writes to neighbors: raw (/helper/css/index.ts)
+- Safe summary: HTML rendering helper combining template literals with automatic escaping, supports nested async children with callback resolution.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg
+- Reads as: plugins.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG index re-exports toSSG from ssg.ts and testing helpers from middleware.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHook, defaultExtensionMap, determineExtension, DEFAULT_CONCURRENCY, DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE, DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR, beforeRequestHook, afterResponseHook, afterGenerateHook
+- Reads as: createPool (/utils/concurrent), getExtension (/utils/mime), AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY (/ssg/middleware), defaultPlugin (/ssg/plugins), filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, joinPaths, dirname (/ssg/utils)
+- Neighbor files: src/help
